settings.brand_featured_text:
Inforcer for Anti Split-ends and Stronger Hair
Discover professional solutions for Split-ends and Brittle hair. Powered by Vitamin B6 + Biotin, #Inforcer enforces, strengthens, and makes the hair more resistant.

settings.section-heading: Explore the 2-Step Strengthening Routine for Anti-Breakage
settings.section-sub-heading: The Inforcer regimen is powered by Vitamin B6 + Biotin that strengthens the hair, making it more resistant and easier to detangle. This enforces brittle hair to become stronger.

settings.description_1:
L'Oréal Serie Expert Inforcer Strengthening Anti-Breakage Shampoo
A gentle daily cleanser that instantly reduces split-ends and breakage making brittle hair more resistant and stronger
settings.description_2:
L'Oréal Serie Expert Inforcer Strengthening Anti-Breakage Masque
A hair treatment with an indulgent reinforcing formula that deeply conditions hair to instantly reduce split-ends and breakage for stronger hair
